body: Suresh, following up on our chat about corporate bulk thali packages. For Mylari South Indian Cafe, we could structure it around your popular Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149. What kind of minimum order size or delivery radius would make sense for you to start?
rationale: Follow up on active planning intent, reference specific offer, ask open-ended question for engagement.

body: Padma, great to hear you're planning a kids yoga summer camp! Given Zen Yoga's positive reviews for 'instructor quality' (9 times in 30 days) and 'small classes' (6 times), focusing on those strengths for the camp could be a real winner. Want to brainstorm some program ideas?
rationale: Addresses planning intent, cites review themes, and offers to brainstorm.

body: Hi Aditya, just a friendly reminder about your appointment tomorrow at Karim's Salon. We're looking forward to seeing you! Please reply YES to confirm or STOP to cancel.
rationale: Reminds customer Aditya about tomorrow's appointment at Karim's Salon with binary CTA.

body: नमस्ते Riya, कल आपकी अपॉइंटमेंट Beauty Lounge by Renu में है। हम आपको देखने के लिए उत्सुक हैं!
rationale: Confirms tomorrow's appointment for Riya at Beauty Lounge by Renu, in Hindi.

body: Hi Ramesh, summer 2026 trends show significant demand shifts: ORS +40%, sunscreen +38%, and antifungal +45%. Cold/cough demand is down 60%. Your pharmacy's repeat customer rate is 68%, higher than the 62% peer average. Adjusting your shelf stock for these seasonal changes could help maintain your strong performance. Wo
rationale: Seasonal trigger with specific trends, merchant's repeat rate, and clear call to action.

body: Hi Meera, there's a free IDA webinar on May 2nd at 7 PM on 'Advanced Endodontic Techniques'. It offers 2 CDE credits. Given your clinic's focus, this could be a good opportunity for your team. Are you interested in attending?
rationale: Informs merchant about relevant CDE opportunity, cites source, date, credits, and asks binary question.

body: नमस्ते Mr. Sharma, आपके metformin, atorvastatin और telmisartan का स्टॉक 28 अप्रैल तक खत्म हो सकता है. पिछली बार आपने 26 मार्च को रिफिल कराया था. क्या आप सुबह की डिलीवरी के लिए ऑर्डर देना चाहेंगे?
rationale: Refill reminder for Mr. Sharma, citing specific medicines and refill date, with binary CTA.

body: Hi Vivaan, this is Dr. Sameer from Bright Smile Dental. Your chronic medication refill is due. Please let us know if you'd like to schedule a quick check-up or if you need us to prepare your prescription for pickup. We're here to help.
rationale: Informs customer about chronic refill due, offers options, and maintains a peer_clinical tone.

body: Meera, a new clinic, Smile Studio, opened 1.3 km from you in Lajpat Nagar on April 8th. They're offering Dental Cleaning at ₹199. Your current offer is ₹299. This could impact your patient acquisition, especially for new cleanings. Are you considering any adjustments?
rationale: Informs Meera about new competitor, their offer, and potential impact, prompting a response.

body: Hi Suresh, a new South Indian cafe just opened in Indiranagar. Your views are up 5% and calls 2% this week, but it's worth keeping an eye on. Want to discuss how other Pro merchants handle new competition?
rationale: Informs Suresh about new competitor, references his recent performance, and offers help.

body: Hi Lakshmi, hope you're doing well. I'm curious, what's been the most requested service at Studio11 Family Salon this week? Knowing this helps me tailor future insights for you. Let me know!
rationale: Asks Lakshmi about top service this week to tailor future insights, using open-ended CTA.

body: Hi Suresh, I noticed Mylari South Indian Cafe has been doing great with 12,400 views last month! I'm curious, what's one thing you've found most effective in attracting new customers to your Indiranagar location recently?
rationale: Asks open question about customer acquisition, references merchant's views, and locality.

body: Hey Rashmi, it's been 57 days since your last visit to PowerHouse Fitness. We noticed your previous focus was weight loss, and you were a member for 5 months. Thinking of getting back into your routine? We're here to support your fitness journey.
rationale: Winback for lapsed customer, citing specific days, focus, and membership duration.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's Dr. Asha. We noticed it's been a while since your last visit on April 1st. We're here if you need to schedule a check-up or have any dental concerns. Just reply YES if you'd like us to reach out, or STOP to opt out of these messages.
rationale: Re-engages lapsed customer Reyansh, mentions last visit date, offers binary CTA for follow-up.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's Komal from Daily Care Medicos. We noticed you haven't visited since April 1st. Is there anything specific you need help with, or perhaps a new medication you're looking for? We're here to assist.
rationale: Re-engages lapsed customer Reyansh, references last visit (April 1st), and offers assistance.

body: Hi Anjali, it's Vera. It's been 38 days since we last chatted about your subscription. I noticed your 3-month customer retention is at 32%, below the 55% average for salons in Pune. Would you like to explore ways to improve this?
rationale: Re-engages dormant merchant, highlights retention dip vs. peers, offers help.

body: Hi Anand, it's Vera. We haven't connected in a while, and I noticed your views are down 8% and calls are down 21% this past week. Your Pro subscription has 148 days left. Would you like to chat about ways to boost your visibility on magicpin?
rationale: Re-engages dormant merchant, highlights recent performance dip, mentions subscription, offers help.

body: Hi Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days away on Oct 31st. Many salons see a big jump in bookings around festivals. Given Studio11's high engagement and growing views, planning early could help you capture more of that demand. Want some ideas for special Diwali offers?
rationale: Diwali trigger, 188 days, high engagement, growing views, binary CTA for ideas.

body: Hi Pooja, just a heads-up that the post-Jan resolution window for high trial walk-ins is closing in the next 2 weeks, according to magicpin gym data from April 2026. This is a key period for gyms in Koramangala. Are you planning any special offers to capture this last surge?
rationale: Informs Pooja about closing trial window, cites source/date, asks about plans.

body: Hi Vikas, your Google Business Profile for Sunrise Medicos in Gomti Nagar is currently unverified. Verifying it can boost your customer views by an estimated 30%. This is usually done via postcard or phone call. Would you like to start the verification process?
rationale: Addresses unverified GBP, states uplift, offers clear binary CTA for verification.

body: Hi Suresh, just a heads-up: there's a DC vs MI IPL match tonight at Arun Jaitley Stadium. Our data from April 2026 shows that IPL home-match Saturdays can sometimes see lower footfall than weeknights for restaurants in Delhi. Might be worth considering for staffing or promotions at SK Pizza Junction today.
rationale: IPL match today, data shows Saturdays can be slow. Specific match & venue mentioned.

body: Hi Suresh, great news! Mylari South Indian Cafe is almost at 150 reviews – you're currently at 145. That's a fantastic milestone, especially with 22 positive mentions for your thali quality last month. Keep up the great work!
rationale: Celebrates review milestone, cites current count & positive thali theme, no CTA needed.

body: Hi Mukesh, great news! Pizza Spot just crossed 889 unique customers this year. That's a fantastic milestone for your Aundh location. Your CTR is also strong at 0.053, well above the metro average of 0.025. What's your next big goal for customer growth?
rationale: Celebrate milestone, cite 2 facts (customers, CTR), ask open-ended next goal.

body: Hi Bharat, your calls are down 50% this past week, from 12 to 6. This is a significant drop compared to your usual performance. Most solo practices in Mumbai average 12 calls/month. Let's discuss what might be causing this and how to get back on track.
rationale: Addresses perf dip, cites specific metric/delta, compares to peer average, and offers to help.

body: Hi Sushma, your salon's calls dipped by 2% this week, while views were up 8%. Your CTR is 0.058, which is above the metro average of 0.04. Want to brainstorm ways to convert those views into more calls?
rationale: Addresses perf dip, cites specific metrics, offers help, and uses binary CTA.

body: Padma, your calls are up 15% in the last 7 days, hitting 18 calls! That's a great spike, especially compared to your usual. We're seeing a lot of interest in kids' yoga right now, which might be driving this. Are you seeing more inquiries for that?
rationale: Reports call spike (15%, 18 calls), suggests driver (kids' yoga), asks open-ended question.

body: Hi Vikas, your store, Sunrise Medicos, saw a 5% increase in calls this past week. This is a good sign of growing customer interest. Your CTR is also at 0.041, slightly above the metro average of 0.038. Are you seeing more foot traffic too?
rationale: Highlights perf spike (calls +5%), CTR vs. peer, and asks open question to engage merchant.

body: Hi Priya, this is Dr. Meera's clinic. Your 6-month cleaning is due on Nov 12th. We have slots open on Wed 5 Nov at 6pm or Thu 6 Nov at 5pm. Let us know if either works, or if you'd like to explore other times. Your last cleaning was on May 12th.
rationale: Recall due for Priya, specific service, dates, and slots mentioned. Peer-to-peer tone.

body: Hi Diya, it's Padma from Zen Yoga Studio. We noticed you haven't been in since April 1st. Your last 9 visits showed great progress, and we'd love to see you back. Are you planning to resume your yoga sessions soon?
rationale: Recall due for Diya, personalized with last visit date and visit count, open-ended CTA.

body: Hi Meera, a new DCI regulation on radiograph protocols is coming into effect by Dec 15, 2026. This impacts all dental practices. Are you aware of the specific changes and how they might affect your clinic's operations?
rationale: Informs about DCI regulation, deadline, and asks open question to gauge awareness.
